data.body:
AC amendment (GAP-001): Triage results are in ca06-e969's ticket comments. Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket show ca06-e969 and parse. Filter for files with classification=replace.

AC amendment (GAP-003): Use naming convention: test-<name>-behavioral.sh. Do NOT overwrite originals.

AC amendment (GAP-004): All new .sh files must have executable bit set (chmod +x). Use tests/lib/assert.sh for assertions.
